title: Phil LaMarr
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Otheruses|Phil}} {{Person |image=[[File:PhilLamarr.jpg]] |name=Phil LaMarr |birth= |death= |listedpronouns= |nationality=[[Wikipedia:United States|American]] |occupation=Actor, voice actor, comedian, writer |companies= |website= }} '''Phil LaMarr''' is an American actor, voice actor, comedian and writer, who has worked on several different projects, including [[Wikipedia:Pulp Fiction|''Pulp Fiction'']] and as a cast member of [[Wikipedia:Mad TV|''Mad TV'']], as well as several voiceover roles in the DC Comics Animated Universe, most notably providing the voice of [[Wikipedia:Green Lantern|Green Lantern]] [[Wikipedia:John Stewart|John Stewart]] in [[Wikipedia:Justice League (TV series)|''Justice League'']] and [[Wikipedia:Justice League Unlimited|''Justice League Unlimited'']], the voice of Jack and various characters in ''Samurai Jack'', the voice of Hermes Conrad and various characters in ''Futurama'', the voice of Vamp in ''Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty'' and ''Metal Gear Solid 4: Guns of the Patriots'', and the voice of Black Vulcan in ''Harvey Birdman, Attorney at Law''. His ''[[Star Wars]]'' roles include [[Gadon Thek]] and additional voices in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', [[Riiken]] and additional voices in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', and [[Jedi Master]] [[Kit Fisto]], [[Amit Noloff]], [[Senator]]s [[Bail Prestor Organa|Bail Organa]], [[Orn Free Taa]], [[Philo]], and the [[T-series military strategic analysis and tactics droid|tactical droids]] in the ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' television series. More recently, he did various voice work for the video game ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' and reprised his role as Senator Organa in [[Star Wars Rebels|''Star Wars: Rebels'']] and ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (television series)|Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi]]''. His short stand-in voice work for [[Jar Jar Binks]] in the ''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' TV series was unknown until 2020. For a long time only a person named '''BJ Hughes''' was credited as having voiced Jar Jar in three episodes of the series, where [[Ahmed Best]] didn't return to voice him. Until BJ Hughes was confirmed to have been an alias for LaMarr, the person behind the name remained an unsolved mystery. ==Biography== {{Quote|Who is B.J. Hughes?|Jimmy Mac|{{WebCite|url=http://www.theforce.net/latestnews/story/ForceCast_January_17_2009_120418.asp|text=Force-Cast: January 17, 2009|date=2009-01-17|work=[[TheForce.net]]|archivedate=20160414130957}}}} In [[2009]], when asked by [[The ForceCast]], [[Lucasfilm]] was unable to find out who BJ Hughes was. In the following episode, when The ForceCast asked [[Dave Filoni]] who exactly BJ Hughes was, Filoni simply said that he replaced Ahmed Best as the voice of Jar Jar in the series and that that was about as far as he could go.{{WebCite|url=http://www.theforce.net/topstory/story/ForceCast_In_The_Cantina_with_Dave_Filoni_120494.asp|text=Force-Cast: In The Cantina with Dave Filoni|date=2009-01-21|work=[[TheForce.net]]|archivedate=20170508035652}} Best later stated in an interview that he had decided to move on to other projects midway through ''The Clone Wars'', necessitating that the role be recast.[[Star Wars Insider 109|''Star Wars Insider'' 109]] In [[2020]], through a tweet Best referred to actor and comedian Phil LaMarr as the person who replaced him briefly as Jar Jar on ''The Clone Wars'' implying that Hughes is actually LaMarr.{{Twitter|ahmedbest|status/1222616635497803776|[[Ahmed Best]]|quote=I appreciate your comment. This was at a time where doing Jar jar was very painful for me. Thankfully my good brother @phillamarr held down the role until I was able to return. Love you @phillamarr. Thanks for being a great friend.|archivedate=20200208074630}} In an ''Avatar: The Last Airbender'' rewatch panel on Twitch hosted by actor Dante Basco and Honor Society, LaMarr confirmed that he voiced Binks before Best returned to the role.{{Twitch|video=843374680|text=#AvatarParty!!! Were ewatching the finale today! Join now! @honor_society_|channel=honorsociety|name=HonorSociety|quote=Although the weird thing is, there was a third one, that I... piece I picked up, that was not actually known until last year. I played Jar Jar in two episodes.|archiveurl=https://archive.vn/ECZ8Y}}{{YouTube|video=d-znlzAj9pY|text=Honorsociety | Lets Watch Avatar Party 29 Twitch Stream Sozin's Comet W/ Zach Tyler Eisen (Aang)|channel=channel/UCyopPeT6kF6RKcy-RFFsRHA|name=ATLA WONDER 2|nobackup=1}}{{Twitch|subdomain=clips|url=ProductiveSpikyMoonDendiFace|text=Jar Jar Binks lore|date=2021-02-06|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20210206185625/https://production.assets.clips.twitchcdn.net/AT-cm%7C1039384252.mp4}}{{WebCite|url=https://neatclip.com/clip/43xjwzwe9|text=HonorSociety|date=2021-02-06|work=neatclip.com|archivedate=20210207014720}} ==Works== ===Filmography===
